context.text: Jakarta is the capital of Indonesia.

question: Which sea lies to the east of the country whose capital is Rome?

context.title: Rome
context.text: Rome is the capital city of Italy.

context.title: Italy geography
context.text: Italy is a peninsula in southern Europe. It is bordered by the Adriatic Sea to its east and the Tyrrhenian Sea to its west.

context.title: Distractor 1
context.text: The Mediterranean Sea lies to the south of Italy.

context.title: Distractor 2
context.text: Greece is located to the east of the Adriatic Sea and its capital is Athens.

question: Which country is Kuala Lumpur the capital of?

context.text: Kuala Lumpur is the capital of Malaysia.

question: What currency is used by the country that is home to the tallest building in the world?

context.title: Tallest building
context.text: The Burj Khalifa is the tallest building in the world, located in Dubai.

context.title: Dubai
context.text: Dubai is the most populous city in the United Arab Emirates (UAE).

context.title: UAE currency
context.text: The official currency of the United Arab Emirates is the UAE dirham.

context.title: Distractor 1
context.text: Saudi Arabia, which planned to build the Jeddah Tower, uses the Saudi riyal.

context.title: Distractor 2
context.text: The United States dollar is widely accepted in many international airports, including Dubai's.

question: Which country is Riyadh the capital of?

question: What gas is produced during the biological process that takes place in the chloroplasts of plants?

context.title: Chloroplasts
context.text: Chloroplasts are the organelles in plant cells where photosynthesis occurs.

context.title: Photosynthesis process
context.text: During photosynthesis, plants take in carbon dioxide and water to produce glucose and release oxygen as a byproduct.

context.title: Distractor 1
context.text: In cellular respiration, which happens in mitochondria, oxygen is consumed and carbon dioxide is produced.

context.title: Distractor 2
context.text: Nitrogen is the most abundant gas in the Earth's atmosphere.

context.title: Tehran
context.text: Tehran is the capital of Iran.

context.text: Iran is in the Middle East.

question: What is the profession of the person who directed the movie starring the lead actor of 'Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol'?

context.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
context.text: The lead actor of Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol is Tom Cruise.

context.title: Tom Cruise movies
context.text: Tom Cruise starred in 'Top Gun: Maverick', which was directed by Joseph Kosinski.

context.title: Joseph Kosinski

question: What is the capital city of the country where the inventor of the telephone was born?

context.title: Alexander Graham Bell
context.text: Alexander Graham Bell, the inventor of the telephone, was born in Edinburgh, Scotland.

context.title: Scotland
context.text: Scotland is a country that is part of the United Kingdom.

context.title: United Kingdom
context.text: The capital city of the United Kingdom is London.

context.title: Distractor 1
context.text: Alexander Graham Bell spent much of his life in the United States, whose capital is Washington, D.C.

context.title: Distractor 2
context.text: The telephone was patented in 1876 in Boston, Massachusetts.

question: Which ocean borders the country that gifted the Statue of Liberty to the USA?

context.title: Statue of Liberty
context.text: The Statue of Liberty was a gift from the people of France to the United States.

context.title: France geography
context.text: France is a country in Western Europe that borders the Atlantic Ocean and the Mediterranean Sea.

context.title: Distractor 1
context.text: The United States borders the Pacific Ocean to the west and the Atlantic Ocean to the east.

context.title: Distractor 2
context.text: The Statue of Liberty is located in New York Harbor.
